body.title: Engram engineering toolkit — four recurring ops as CC-side tools
body.text:
# D-engram-engineering-toolkit-2026-04-23

**title:** Engram engineering toolkit — four recurring ops as CC-side tools
**date:** 2026-04-23
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-trace-to-miss-report, T-deposit-grounding-engram, T-verify-retrieval, T-confabulation-scanner

## Narrative

This morning's Igor confabulation forensics (tracing "I'm in the web channel" capability confab + "April 2025" date-drift fact confab) required four ad-hoc op sequences: trace→miss, deposit, verify, scan. Both came up twice before noon.

Build these as reusable CC-side tools under lab/claudecode/engram_tools/ so the engram-engineer hat has proper instruments. Rationale: we don't know how many passes before Igor is unblocked — tooling each recurring op means every subsequent pass is faster and consistent rather than ad-hoc MCP-call chains.

**Confabulation subtypes identified (language for future work):**
- *Capability confabulation* — "I can't access X from Y", "I don't have direct access to fetch that URL" — LLM reaches for channel-capability excuses with no grounding anchor in Igor's memory
- *Fact confabulation* — temporal drift (wrong dates/versions), wrong version numbers — LLM uses training priors over current-state memory
- *Self confabulation* — "I'm in the web channel", "I'm just an LLM" — LLM misidentifies Igor's architectural nature

**Grounding gap pattern:** When cortex retrieval surfaces no grounding anchor for a query domain (e.g. "what can Igor do through which channel"), the LLM fills the void with training-corpus priors. Tool chain: scanner finds the tell → trace-to-miss finds the activation gap → deposit-engram closes the gap → verify-retrieval confirms closure.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-04-23T16:01:54.710567+00:00
**Ticket count:** 4 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-confabulation-scanner (S) — Engram tool: scan recent turns for confabulation tell-phrase signatures  `done` — ConfabScanner with capability/self/fact detection. 19 tests covering both real 2026-04-23 cases (897ad9c0, fb274171). CLI entrypoint for standalone use. 965037d0.
- T-trace-to-miss-report (S) — Engram tool: turn_id → retrieval-miss analysis report  `done` — TraceMissAnalyzer with 5 miss-flag heuristics + suggested engram shape. 20 tests including 897ad9c0 real-case fixture from 2026-04-23. Loaders injected for testability. 98569060.
- T-deposit-grounding-engram (S) — Engram tool: deposit grounding FACTUAL memory for confab-prone query space  `done` — GroundingEngram + deposit() with shape validation (anchor-keyword-in-narrative enforcement). Uses existing FACTUAL + metadata, no new schema. 15 tests. c4452da3.
- T-verify-retrieval (S) — Engram tool: verify deposited engram surfaces for target queries  `done` — verify() wrapping cortex.search per target query, with rank + top-k checks. all_pass() helper. 22 tests covering happy path, input validation, result shape tolerance (Memory/dict/string). fc2a2895.

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
